summary: Ukrainian forces eliminated Russian propagandist Evgeny Nikolayev (call sign "Hayduk"), co-founder of the WarGonzo Telegram channel, in Donetsk region on March 10 using an FPV drone. Russian drone units from the "Sever" group are using "Molniya" drones with log-periodic antennas to target Ukrainian UAV control points and chase survivors in Korenek, Sumy region. The "Rubicon" Center reported 11 enemy targets destroyed on March 16, including FPV anti-drone operations against Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and a Gepard anti-aircraft system. A ZALA Lancet loitering munition destroyed another M777 howitzer in Sumy region after detection by a Z-16 UAV. Iranian-backed militias attacked US Victory Base near Baghdad with fiber-optic FPV drones. Ukrainian FPV pilots are employing tactics to disrupt Russian forces before strikes, while Russian infantryman attempting to charge an FPV drone with a bayonet was killed. Russian "Yolka" and "Elka" anti-aircraft drones continue kinetic interceptions of Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs.
